name: build-a-grammar
_comment: Steps are screenshotted in order. `goto` is a path (or full URL). `highlight` outlines a data-tour element. `authed:true` needs auth.json (run login.mjs once). `wait_for` waits for a selector; `click`/`fill` interact. Customize the URLs/selectors for your flow.

steps.name: library
steps.caption: Browse the Library — every public grammar across channels.

steps.name: open-deck
steps.caption: Open a published deck to see the cards rendered.

steps.name: create-name
steps.caption: In Create, give your new grammar a name.

steps.name: add-items
steps.caption: Add cards by hand — or let the Grammar Assistant draft them all.

steps.name: assistant
steps.caption: The Grammar Assistant authors + illustrates items for you.

steps.name: view-modes
steps.caption: Preview the deck in any viewer via the Eye menu.

steps.name: publish
steps.caption: Publish to share it — you get a link anyone can open.
